title: Cocktail Life Too Short Tropical
source_attribution: Tropical bar campaign (origin unknown, design study)
copyright_notice: Reference for design study. Not for redistribution.
typography_summary: Display italic display + tracked caps secondary
composition_summary: Hero centrado com leve lower-third, masthead-bottom oferta
why_good: Chiaroscuro lighting cria drama hospitality premium
Display italic Cormorant-feel + tracked caps subtitle = 2 camadas tipográficas claras
Garnish visível e respeitada (orange wheel + cherry — ambos reais)
Background tropical leaves blur dá ambiente sem competir com glass
caveats: A oferta 'BUY 1 GET 1 FREE' é uso comercial — Só Rio nunca faz isto. Usar para mood/lighting apenas
